_comment: Comprehensive catalog of data elements BPO can access for hydrate and deck mapping. Use entries[].terms for phrase resolution; keep this list exhaustive across source payloads, including nested Salesforce comprehensive categories.

terms: [Pendo] LeanDNA staff visitors excluded from metrics
[config cohorts.yaml] cohort / optional exclude / vertical per customer; portfolio junk prefixes → portfolio_exclude_prefixes.yaml (not nested under report)
[config portfolio_exclude_prefixes.yaml] bogus Pendo-derived customer prefixes omitted from portfolio rollup (not nested under report)

[CSR site row] keys may include: factory health_score clear_to_build_pct clear_to_commit_pct component_availability_pct component_availability_projected_pct shortages critical_shortages weekly_active_buyers_pct buyer_mapping_quality high_risk_items site entity
[CSR site row] keys may include: factory savings_current_period open_ia_value recs_created_30d pos_placed_30d overdue_tasks current_fy_spend previous_fy_spend site entity
[CSR site row] keys may include: factory on_hand_value on_order_value excess_on_hand doi_days days_coverage turns_of_inventory late_pos late_prs site entity
[GitHub] blob when present on report — structure varies by wiring
[Jira] HELP scope issue count in window
[Pendo Kei] top user rows (email, role, queries, is_executive)
